  • Uses of CommandArgumentContext in org.mose.command

    Methods in org.mose.command with parameters of type CommandArgumentContext
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static <T> @NotNull CommandArgumentResult<T>
    CommandArgumentResult.from​(CommandArgumentContext<T> argumentContext, int length, T value)
    This creates a CommandArgumentResult which processes the argument by the specified amount
    static <T> @NotNull CommandArgumentResult<T>
    CommandArgumentResult.from​(CommandArgumentContext<T> argumentContext, T value)
    This creates a CommandArgumentResult which processes the argument by 1
    @NotNull CommandArgumentResult<T>
    ParseCommandArgument.parse​(@NotNull CommandContext context, @NotNull CommandArgumentContext<T> argument)
    Parses the command argument
    @NotNull Collection<String>
    SuggestCommandArgument.suggest​(@NotNull CommandContext commandContext, @NotNull CommandArgumentContext<T> argument)
    Gets the suggestions for this command
